name: Skillet Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 12-inch skillet with nonstick spray and coat.
2. Brown the chicken pieces on all sides over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet.
4. Drain any fat from the skillet if necessary.
5. Add mushrooms, carrots, rice, onion, bouillon, poultry seasoning, 2 cups water, and salt to the skillet.
6. Place the chicken on top of the rice mixture.
7. Cover; simmer for 30 minutes or until the chicken and rice are cooked through.
Per Serving: 265 Calories, 25g Protein, 27g Carbohydrates, 6g Fat, 67mg Cholesterol
